Package component.modifier.pathway

Class Exit

java.lang.Object
component.modifier.Modifier
component.modifier.pathway.Pathway
component.modifier.pathway.Exit
All Implemented Interfaces:
Tippable, GridIndexable
public class Exit extends Pathway
The Exit class is a specialized Pathway that evaluates cards to determine if level objectives have been met.

When a card enters this tile, it is removed from the board and compared against the current expected card in the level's output sequence.

  • Constructor Details

    • Exit

      public Exit()

  • Method Details

    • modify

      public void modify(Card toRemove)
      Evaluates the card against the level's goal sequence.

      Logic flow: 1. Removes the card from the grid. 2. Retrieves the expectedCard for the current index. 3. Uses isEquivalent to check if the card matches the goal (ignoring material). 4. Updates statistics and emits a CardExitEvent for the UI and GameLevel.

      Specified by:
      modify in class Modifier
      Parameters:
      toRemove - The card reaching the end of its path.

    • isBlocking

      public boolean isBlocking()
      Specified by:
      isBlocking in interface GridIndexable
      Overrides:
      isBlocking in class Pathway
      Returns:
      false. Cards must be able to enter the exit to be evaluated.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the exit's internal counters for level restarts.
      Overrides:
      reset in class Pathway

    • getTooltip

      public Tooltip getTooltip()
      Generates a tooltip showing what card the player needs to provide next.
      Specified by:
      getTooltip in interface Tippable
      Overrides:
      getTooltip in class Modifier
      Returns:
      A Tooltip with goal information.
